Emily starts with [initial_dog_count] dogs at her rescue center. On [day_of_week_1], she received [number_of_puppies] puppies from [location_1]. Then, on [day_of_week_2], a family brought in [number_of_stray_dogs] stray dog they had found near [location_2]. These additions increased the number of dogs in the center, bringing the total to [total_after_additions]. 

***

On [day_of_week_3], [number_of_families] families adopted [number_of_dogs_per_family] dogs each, which meant [total_adopted_dogs] dogs left the center. After these adoptions, the remaining number of dogs in Emily's rescue center is [final_dog_count]. This number reflects all the changes over the week, from the initial [initial_dog_count] to the final [final_dog_count] after adoptions and new arrivals.
